text:
UNDER THE TREE is the theme song for Special 1, composed and performed by .

Lyrics
 

TV size
 
 
 

Complete version

 
 

Ending animation

It begins with only a black screen, followed by a shooting from above of the lower half of the body of a person walking down an unpaved path with grass on the sides. After a few tens of steps, the screen fades back to black.

After some more time, new, still images appear on the screen one after the other. They depict a flock of birds soaring in the sky above a forest, their loosened feathers fluttering in the air.

The camera goes back to the initial shooting, but at some point, as the person continues their walk, the image blurs and three stills are superimposed on to it: the tree under which Eren Jaeger was sleeping in Episode 1; the Coordinate at the center of the Paths, which also resembles a tree; and the tree beneath which Ymir Fritz obtained the Power of the Titans. The screen goes black one last time.

Video clips

Trivia

Although the identity of the person walking in the ending animation is unknown, the colors of their trousers and shoes suggest it is Eren Jaeger.
The lyric "If I lose it all" is a reference to the opening of The Final Season Part 2, "The Rumbling."
